summary: Validated VAL-CORE-001, VAL-CORE-002, and VAL-CORE-005 against the public cyrus-core dist surface; all three assertions passed.

assertionResults.evidence: A node --input-type=module script importing packages/core/dist/index.js used PersistenceManager with the assigned zero-single-types namespace, saved zero-association-session with repositoryAssociations: [], reloaded it successfully, and observed repositoryAssociationsLength=0 with workspace.path preserved as /tmp/zero-top-level-workspace.

The same public-API script saved and reloaded single-association-session with repositoryAssociations[0].repositoryId='repo-single' while the top-level workspace.path remained /tmp/top-level-session-workspace and repositoryAssociations[0].executionWorkspace.path remained /tmp/repository-association-execution-workspace, confirming workspacePathsDiffer=true after reload.

packages/core/dist/CyrusAgentSession.d.ts exposes repositoryAssociations?: CyrusAgentSessionRepositoryAssociation[] at line 69 and packages/core/dist/index.d.ts re-exports CyrusAgentSessionRepositoryAssociation types at line 4; targeted grep found no public 'primaryRepository' or 'currentRepository' shortcuts in either declaration file.
